title: TERRA Leaderboard Entry
description: Schema for a community leaderboard submission. Submit by adding a JSON file to leaderboard/entries/ via pull request.

submission_id.description: Unique identifier for this submission. Recommended format: YYYY-MM-robot-lab (e.g. 2025-04-atlas-mit).

benchmark_version.description: TERRA benchmark version used for this submission (e.g. '2.0').

task_scores.description: Per-task TaskScore values for each task run. Keys are task IDs (T1–T8).

tss.description: TERRA Standard Score: (T1 + T2 + T3 + T4 + 2×T5 + T6 + T7 + 2×T8) / 10. Auto-computed on merge if omitted.

cli.description: Closed-Loop Index: (T5 + T8) / (T1 + T3). Requires T1, T3, T5, T8. Auto-computed on merge if omitted.

paper_url.description: Optional arXiv or publication URL for the paper reporting these results.

video_url.description: Optional URL to video evidence of the evaluation runs.

measurement_methods.description: Method codes for each metric as defined in docs/measurement-protocol.md.

hardware_cost_usd.description: Optional estimated apparatus build cost in USD for this submission.

notes.description: Free-form notes about this submission (equipment, conditions, deviations from protocol).
